pages.title: About Inkwell Journal and this collections demo
pages.description: Inkwell Journal is a working OlonJS demo: posts and tags live as separate collections, related through keys on the post side and resolved at render time.

pages.title: Authors
pages.description: Author directory powered by the autori collection.

pages.title: Contact the Inkwell Journal editorial desk
pages.description: Write to the Inkwell Journal desk about the essays, the OlonJS collections demo, or anything in between. We answer within two working days.

pages.title: Home
pages.description: OlonJS tenant alpha — form smoke test

pages.title: Inkwell Journal — Notes on the craft of software
pages.description: An editorial journal about design, engineering and process, built on OlonJS collections: every post and every tag is a first-class entity with its own page.

pages.title: Libri
pages.description: Catalogo libri dimostrativo alimentato da COP collections.

pages.title: Dettaglio libro
pages.description: Pagina dinamica dettaglio libro alimentata dalla collection libri.

pages.title: Post — Inkwell Journal essay detail
pages.description: A single essay from the Inkwell Journal posts collection, with its related topics resolved live from the posts-to-tags relation.

pages.title: All posts — Inkwell Journal essay archive
pages.description: The complete archive of Inkwell Journal essays on design, engineering, writing and process, rendered as a timeline from the posts collection.

pages.title: Topic — Inkwell Journal posts by tag
pages.description: A single topic from the tags collection, with every matching essay computed live by filtering the posts collection on the current tag key.

pages.title: Topics — browse Inkwell Journal by tag
pages.description: Six topics spanning design, engineering, process, writing, tooling and culture. Each tag page computes its own post list from the posts-to-tags relation.
